name: DNA Codons
content:
**Description:** Dataset of DNA codons and their corresponding amino acids, including stop signals used in the process of translating genetic information into proteins.

[Source](https://github.com/zhanxw/anno/blob/master/codon.txt)

**Columns:**

* **Codon (string):** A sequence of three nucleotides (A, T, C, G) representing a unit of genetic code.
* **Amino Acid (string):** The three-letter abbreviation for the amino acid (e.g., Met).
* **Letter (string):** The one-letter code representing the amino acid (e.g., M).
* **Full Name (string):** The amino acid specified by the codon, using the full name (e.g., Methionine).
